title: New York Street Basketball Janitor Shot
description: A cinematic video prompt describing an urban basketball sequence in New York, where a basketball is passed through a diverse crowd before an elderly janitor sinks a perfect shot.
promptText:
**Setting:** Busy New York street basketball court at golden hour. Graffiti-covered walls, food trucks, street performers, brownstones, fire escapes, warm sunlight reflecting off windows, energetic urban atmosphere. Arri Alexa 35 look, shallow depth of field, dynamic handheld camera, ultra-fast cuts, cinematic motion blur. 
CUT 1 (0:00–0:01.5) An elderly man playing chess beside the court casually nudges a basketball with his cane, sending it rolling toward the sidewalk.
 CUT 2 (0:01.5–0:03) A teenage skateboarder notices the ball, hops off his board, and flicks it upward with his foot while still moving.
CUT 3 (0:03–0:04.5) A street dancer spins, catching the ball on his shoulder before bouncing it backward without breaking rhythm.  
CUT 4 (0:04.5–0:06) The ball flies toward a hot dog stand. The vendor casually taps it away using his serving tray, laughing.  
CUT 5 (0:06–0:07.5) A courier riding a bicycle passes by and redirects the bouncing ball with a precise elbow touch.
CUT 6 (0:07.5–0:09) A young girl sitting on a bench pops the ball upward with the sole of her sneaker while continuing to read her comic book.
CUT 7 (0:09–0:10.5) An elderly janitor sweeping the court pauses. He plants his broom, removes his cap, and calmly positions himself. Street noise gradually fades. 
CUT 8 (0:10.5–0:12.5) The janitor launches a perfect no-look shot. Slow-motion tracking follows the spinning basketball soaring through golden sunlight as everyone watches in disbelief. 
CUT 9 (0:12.5–0:14) The ball drops cleanly into a rusty rooftop hoop mounted three stories above the court. The net snaps dramatically as pigeons burst into the sky. 
CUT 10 (0:14–0:15) The janitor picks up his broom, puts his cap back on, and walks away without looking back as the stunned crowd erupts behind him.  
Audio: Authentic New York street ambience, distant hip-hop beats gradually building with each pass, near silence before the final shot, triumphant music swell as the ball goes through the hoop, ending on a single satisfying swish sound.

title: Ultra-Realistic Cinematic Street Racing
description: A complex, multi-scene video prompt for a 15-second street racing sequence featuring luxury convertibles, dialogue, and high-speed action.
promptText:
Create a **15-second ultra-realistic cinematic street racing scene** on a wide coastal highway during golden hour. Two **luxury convertible sports cars** are stopped side by side in the same direction. On the left is a **red Ferrari convertible** with a confident, stylish man wearing a black suit and black sunglasses driving, his elegant girlfriend seated beside him. On the right is a **white Toyota Supra convertible** with two casually dressed young men inside. The atmosphere is calm before the race, with premium cinematic lighting, realistic reflections, shallow depth of field, and Hollywood-level camera work.

**0–3 sec:**
Front three-quarter cinematic shot of both cars. The Supra driver smiles and says naturally:
**"Nice car... What's the retail on one of those?"**
The Ferrari driver smirks confidently and replies:
**"More than you can afford, pal... Ferrari."**
The girlfriend smiles confidently.

**3–5 sec:**
Inside the Supra. Both friends glance at each other with determined expressions. The passenger leans toward the driver and says:
**"Smoke 'em."**
The driver nods with a confident grin.

**5–10 sec:**
Rear low-angle tracking shot. Both cars launch aggressively at the same time. Tires spin violently, thick white smoke erupts, rubber burns, tiny stones scatter, engines roar, and the cars accelerate at full speed. Fast cinematic cuts show wheel close-ups, gear shifts, exhaust flames, speedometer needles climbing, aerial drone shots, and dynamic side tracking shots as the race unfolds at extreme speed.

**10–13 sec:**
Front tracking camera as the **Supra pulls ahead**, overtakes the Ferrari cleanly, and crosses the finish first. The Ferrari driver looks shocked while the girlfriend is visibly surprised.

**13–15 sec:**
The Supra slows slightly. The driver looks across at the Ferrari with a calm smile and says:
**"Don't compare."**
End on a dramatic slow-motion hero shot of the victorious Supra driving into the sunset while the Ferrari trails behind.

**Style:** Hyper-realistic, Hollywood action film, premium automotive commercial quality, realistic physics, cinematic motion blur, volumetric lighting, detailed reflections, 8K look, high-speed camera movements, powerful engine sound design, natural facial expressions, perfectly synced dialogue, no text or subtitles.

title: Primordial Forest Cinematic Video
description: A highly detailed cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a primordial forest with bioluminescent spores, ancient trees, and an epic mystical atmosphere.
promptText: The camera bursts upward from the damp, mossy floor of a primordial forest, rocketing through a dense thicket of giant ferns as bioluminescent spores scatter like fireflies around the lens. It erupts through the lower canopy in a shower of glowing, ethereal dew, racing past the towering, twisted trunks of ancient colossal trees carved with deep, glowing runes. Vibrant shafts of emerald and violet light filter through the leaves, casting radiant highlights across the bark as the camera spirals with breathtaking speed, banking left through hanging vines before climbing into an endless, majestic upper canopy kissed by silver moonlight. Below, the forest breathes with immense life; instead of darkness, the foliage glows with deep jade, cyan, and indigo, flowers blooming in spectacular slow-motion bursts of light. The camera dives again, twisting between shafts of moonlight, skimming inches from a massive glowing branch, then snapping into a dramatic overhead tilt. At the edge of a suspended mossy precipice stands a lone figure, unmoving and fearless, silhouetted by a massive, glowing nebula in the night sky, their cloak billowing in the updraft as they stare into the infinite forest like they are its guardian. The camera circles higher and higher, faster and faster, revealing the full scale of the breathtaking ecosystem: radiant glowing flora, towering mega-trees, and pollen exploding in luminous detail. The figure slowly raises their head and steps forward. At that instant, the entire forest canopy surges upward in a colossal, synchronized burst of pure, glowing energy, moonlight blazing through it like liquid silver, creating an epic, awe-inspiring cinematic climax filled with ancient power and wonder. title: 2000s Korean Neighborhood DV Camcorder Vlog
description: A comprehensive video generation prompt for creating a nostalgic 2000s-style home video. It defines consistent character traits, setting details, and specific camera behaviors like handheld shake and autofocus hunting for an authentic aesthetic.
promptText:
15 seconds, 16:9. Main subject from @ image1 — lock her completely. Face, skin tone, body, outfit, everything stays identical the whole way through. She's wearing a grey faded sleeveless crop top, loose high-waist light blue jeans, black canvas sneakers, black cord necklace, black wavy hair in a messy side-swept ponytail with bangs. Korean woman, early-2000s feel.

The whole thing is shot in a quiet Korean residential neighborhood — narrow concrete alleys, low-rise houses with small terraces, a front yard with a clothesline, potted plants, parked bicycles and motorcycles, big trees, and overhead cables everywhere. No shops, no vendors, nothing commercial. Just a real neighborhood.

Camera treatment is the whole point. This needs to look like someone's friend grabbed a DV camcorder and just started recording — no plan, no setup, no nothing. Heavy handheld shake, constant reframing, subject drifting toward the edges, autofocus hunting, lens breathing, exposure pumping. The image itself should look faded, low contrast, slightly washed out, with that digital noise and compression feel that early-2000s home video had. No stabilization. No modern grading. This aesthetic is non-negotiable.

She starts sitting on a concrete sidewalk fixing her ponytail, arms raised, genuine smile, wind catching her hair — camera barely holding focus. Then the camera follows her into a narrow alley where she crouches down and feeds a stray cat that comes right up to her. After that she's in her front yard hanging laundry on the clothesline, morning breeze moving everything, camera swaying and hunting. Mid-section she's on the front terrace with a coffee cup, just sitting quietly, looking out at the street — loose drifting shot from the side. Then a right-side close shot where she raises her arm, waves warmly toward someone off-frame and says "Annyeong" — camera catches it a beat late. Final shot is a slow tracking walk down the street, coffee cup in hand, she notices the lens, turns slightly and gives a real quiet smile — then the recording just cuts to black mid-motion like the camcorder got switched off.

Audio is strictly natural. Morning birds, light breeze, distant motorcycle sounds, faint neighborhood chatter, cat, coffee cup, footsteps on concrete, leaves. No music, no sound design, nothing added.

title: Ancient Palace Beauty Multi-Shot Video Prompt
description: A complex multi-shot cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 depicting a noble woman in an ancient palace, featuring specific shot transitions, micro-expressions, and atmospheric lighting.
promptText:
FIRST FRAME (= upload reference image, 100% locked):
A palace beauty, high black hair bun, golden flower hairpin with long pearl tassels hanging to shoulders, red floral mark on forehead, crimson gold-embroidered tube top dress, thin gauze shawl exposing shoulders, gold thread waistband with white jade ornaments; leaning against a carved stone railing, surrounded by blooming peonies, with palace towers, a lotus pond with falling blossoms, and warm evening light in the background. Facial features, makeup, hair accessories, clothing, and posture are 100% consistent with the first frame, no deformation or face-swapping.

SCRIPT (Shot breakdown, minimal dialogue, focus on micro-expressions):

SHOT 1 | 0-3s | Medium Close-up (Maintain first frame posture)
Leaning against the stone railing, gaze toward the far right, eyes lazy and slightly tipsy, eyelashes tremble slightly, chest rises and falls slowly with breath; corners of the mouth turn up imperceptibly. No dialogue, only environmental sounds (breeze, falling blossoms, distant water).

SHOT 2 | 3-6s | Eye Close-up (Macro cut-in)
Lens pushes to a close-up of the eyes: pupils move slightly, eyes shimmer, gaze sweeps to the side, eyelashes blink once, eyes shift from lazy to thoughtful.
[Very light breathy voice · Half sentence] "...Another year of blossoms falling."

SHOT 3 | 6-9s | Facial Details (Profile -> Lips)
Cut to profile close-up: lips purse slightly, throat moves like a soft sigh, eyebrows slightly knit then relax; a strand of hair is blown across the cheek by the wind. No dialogue, only a very light sigh.

SHOT 4 | 9-12s | Hand + Shawl Detail
Cut to hand on the stone railing: fingertips gently stroke the cool stone surface, jade bracelet on the wrist sways slightly; gauze shawl and skirt corner are lifted by the wind, petals fall on the skirt. Camera pans up extremely slowly with the falling petals. No dialogue.

SHOT 5 | 12-15s | Return to Medium Close-up (Ending freeze)
Slowly turns head back, looks straight ahead, eyes soft and moist, with a half-smile, lips move slightly then stop (words left unsaid).
[Breathy · Fading out] "Let it be."
Finally returns to quiet gazing, frozen in a state of graceful laziness and a hint of clear sorrow.

Voice Setting: Female, lazy and elegant, high breathiness, very slow speed, only two short whispers throughout, the rest focus on breathing, sighs, and eye performance; dialogue strictly matches mouth movements.

CAMERA:
Multi-camera storyboard—Medium close-up / Eye macro / Profile close-up / Hand close-up / Back to medium close-up; each cut is clean (hard cut or very short dissolve), shallow depth of field, background peonies and palace towers blurred.

Atmosphere · Lighting:
Golden side-backlighting at sunset, warm and luxurious; petals falling with the wind, lotus pond rippling, pearl tassels swaying slightly, golden dust floating in the air, tone is graceful, lazy, and reservedly melancholic.

CONSTRAINTS:
- 4K Ultra HD, 15s, character/makeup/clothing 100% consistent with first frame across all shots.
- Real and delicate micro-expressions are the core of performance.
- Dialogue and mouth movements strictly synchronized, breathy texture, no fake singing.
- Shot transitions are natural and coherent, slow pace, no dropped frames or flickering.
- Meaningful gaze; no glowing eyes, no abnormal pupils.
- Wind, falling blossoms, tassels, shawl, and water follow real physics.
- No black screen at the end, natural freeze.
- No subtitles, no watermark, no text.

title: VTuber Style Cooking Live Video
description: A comprehensive prompt for generating a cooking commentary video that features a VTuber-style character overlay and realistic cooking visuals for Black Pepper Beef.
promptText: Use the character from the reference image as a VTuber-style live commentary avatar. Maintain the impression of a green polygonal mask, black borders, narrow eyes, black eyebrows, a large purple tongue, a white head, and black clothes. The character is overlaid as a small 2D/Live2D-style streamer avatar in the bottom right of the screen, not interfering with the background cooking video. The avatar shows only the upper body, with light vertical swaying, blinking, lip-syncing, facial expression changes, witty remarks, and reactions. The video is a cooking commentary showing the preparation of Qingjiao Rousi (Black Pepper Beef with Peppers). The main screen is live-action or cinematic cooking footage. Thinly slice bell peppers, bamboo shoots, and beef or pork on a cutting board. Include realistic sounds of the knife, oil splashing, the wok shaking, and ingredients frying. The cooking process follows: seasoning the meat, coating with starch, cutting peppers and bamboo shoots, stir-frying meat on high heat, adding vegetables, seasoning with oyster sauce, soy sauce, sake, and sugar, and finally stir-frying until glossy and plating. The screen layout is game/cooking stream style. The main cooking video is full screen with the VTuber avatar fixed at the bottom right. A small 'COOKING LIVE' style UI can be shown in the top left, but do not use real service logos. If subtitles or comments are included, place them subtly as a fictional UI. No UI is needed if text is unnecessary. Avatar commentary: 'Hey everyone, today we're making Qingjiao Rousi.' 'First, slice the peppers thinly. If you're sloppy here, it's all over.' 'Season the meat and lock in the umami with starch. This is quietly important.' 'The wok needs high heat. The sound is already a win.' 'The moment the peppers go in, the color turns it into a dish instantly.' 'Adding oyster sauce is a guaranteed win. The scent is cheating.' 'And it's done. White rice, please run away.' Avatar reaction effects: when the slicing is done perfectly, the avatar narrows its eyes and nods. When frying on high heat, the avatar leans forward slightly and lip-syncs excitedly. When the sauce is added and steam rises, the avatar emphasizes the purple tongue and is surprised, saying 'This looks good.' At completion, the avatar claps smallly at the bottom right and nods satisfactorily. Video style: high-quality cooking footage, clean kitchen, natural or warm lighting. Make ingredient colors look vibrant. Emphasize the oil's glow, steam, sauce gloss, and pepper green. The camera switches between close-ups of hands, top-down cooking surface shots, low-angle wok shots, and plating close-ups. The VTuber avatar is always fixed at the bottom right, with consistent size and position. It must not block the cooking footage. Prohibitions: Do not change character face or mask design. Do not change tongue color. Do not turn into a different character. Do not make the avatar a live person. Do not use real streaming service logos. Do not skip cooking steps too much. Ensure hands and avatar do not overlap awkwardly. Ingredients must not transform into other dishes mid-way. The finished product must be clearly recognizable as Qingjiao Rousi, with thin-sliced meat, peppers, bamboo shoots, and a brown glossy sauce.

title: Ancient Chinese Woman Cinematic Video Prompt
description: A highly detailed, professional-grade prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a 15-second 4K video of an ancient Chinese woman with synchronized dialogue and realistic emotional transitions.
promptText:
FIRST FRAME (= upload reference image, 100% locked):

Ancient Chinese woman, golden hairpin with pearl tassels over her face, crimson and gold-embroidered outer robe over white inner garment, holding a landscape folding fan and a branch of white plum/cherry blossom; standing in a corridor with red pillars, golden side light at sunset, ginkgo leaves falling, reflections on the wet bluestone ground. The character's facial features, hairstyle, clothing, accessories, fan pattern, and composition are 100% consistent with the first frame, with no deformation or face-swapping throughout.

Character · Expression · Action · Dialogue (Emotional scene, mouth movements strictly aligned with dialogue):

0-2s: Slightly lowers head and gaze, eyes on the folding fan, corners of the mouth holding a reserved, subtle smile.
[Softly · Breathily] "The wind in this corridor has picked up again."

2-4s: The smile slowly fades, head lifts slightly, gaze shifts to the right side of the frame, expression becomes serious.
[Slight pause] "You said... you would come back to see the leaves cover these steps."

4-6s: A trace of faint doubt and worry appears in the eyes, lips move slightly as if wanting to speak but stopping—do not frown.
[Sentence cut short] "Now..." (Voice stops, unfinished)

6-8s: Gaze slowly sinks, quiet disappointment, eyes dimming, no tears.
[Almost silent · Lips only] "Never mind."

8-10s: Lowers head and slightly closes eyes, corners of the mouth forming an extremely faint, self-mocking smile.
[Self-muttering · Breath-like laugh] "I suppose I've waited too long."

10-12s: Looks up toward the warm light, expression restrained, eyes gentle but aggrieved.
[Lightly but steadily] "I don't blame you, really."

12-15s: Looks straight ahead/to the right, eyes soft and moist, lips move slightly as if about to speak, finally settling into a quiet gaze, frozen in a gentle, cold, and slightly melancholic state.
[Final sentence breathy · Fading out] "...I only hope you are well."

Voice Setting: Female, gentle and cold, high breathiness, slow speed, end of sentences slightly dipping; emotions are restrained, like a whisper to oneself, perfectly matching the facial mouth movements throughout.

CAMERA:

Fixed medium close-up, very slow push-in, always focused on the face and eyes; shallow depth of field, red pillars and falling leaves in the background blurred. One continuous shot, no cuts, no transitions.

Atmosphere · Light:

Golden side-backlighting at sunset, warm and soft; ginkgo leaves/petals falling naturally with the breeze, reflections on wet stone ground, fine air quality; the tone is gentle, cold, reserved, and melancholic.

CONSTRAINTS:

- 4K Ultra HD, 15 seconds, character/clothing/scene 100% consistent with the first frame.
- Dialogue and mouth movements strictly synchronized, clear and natural pronunciation, breathy texture, no fake singing or misalignment.
- Expressions progress according to a 7-stage emotional curve, smooth transitions, no dropped frames or stuttering.
- Meaningful gaze; no glowing eyes, no abnormal pupils.
- Wind movement, falling leaves, tassels, and fan tassels follow real physics, soft and not exaggerated.
- No black screen or transition at the end, natural freeze-frame.
- No subtitles, no watermark, no marking symbols, no text.

[CONDITION DEFINITION]

title: Cinematic Fantasy POV Crowd Battle
description: A detailed video prompt for a realistic fantasy combat scene filmed from a handheld smartphone perspective in a crowd, featuring magical effects and a giant rival.
promptText:
Style: photoreal live-action, filmed on a spectator's handheld smartphone from a huge daytime crowd at an open-air theater (matching @Image1) — raised phones in the foreground, distant city; bright sun-drenched daytime; realistic, weighty, effective fantasy combat with GRAND black-energy VFX; stylized magic, no blood, no gore.
CAMERA: a FIXED camera position, NO zoom, NO push-in, NO dolly — only small pans and tilts to keep the fight in frame; stay wide, no face close-ups.
@Image2 = the hero archer with his giant obsidian bow; he teleports in bursts of black dust-energy to deliberate flanking positions, aiming his arrows purposefully.
@Image3 = the giant rival, about twice the hero's height, who actively FIGHTS BACK throughout — charging and hurling ripped-up stones.
ONE continuous shot, no cuts, FIXED camera, minimal pan/tilt only:
0-4s: the giant rips a slab of stone from the ground and HURLS it at the archer; the archer teleports in black dust to dodge, lands at a flanking spot to the giant's LEFT and looses an arrow that opens a swirling BLACK HOLE right there beside the giant — a deliberate mark.
4-8s: the giant tears up another stone and throws again, then swings a heavy arm; the archer teleports to dodge and repositions to the giant's RIGHT, loosing another arrow that opens a second black hole deliberately beside him — a real back-and-forth exchange.
8-11s: the giant charges and swings hard; the archer teleports behind him and looses a big obsidian arrow that strikes the GIANT square in the chest and stays embedded there, glowing.
11-15s: the two flanking black holes ignite and PULL the giant from both sides at once; he is dragged apart into great streams of black dust shot through with swirling dark-blue energy and sucked into the vortexes; the holes collapse and vanish; the crowd erupts.
Audio: roaring crowd; stone tearing and heavy thrown-rock impacts, teleport dust whooshes, taut bow draws and sharp arrow releases, vortex hums as black holes open, a heavy thunk as the arrow embeds, a building gravitational roar then a suck-and-collapse boom, scattering dust, crowd erupts on the final frame.
Preserve: ONE continuous shot, no cuts; FIXED camera, pan/tilt only, NO zoom, stay wide, no face close-ups; the hero (@Image2) with obsidian bow, the giant (@Image3) ~2x height actively fighting back with stone throws; purposeful black-hole placement beside the giant; photoreal live-action; black dust-energy, obsidian arrows, swirling black holes, dark-blue energy within the black dust; distant huge stage, crowd and city from @Image1; foreground spectators with raised phones; stylized fantasy, no blood or gore; no on-screen text.

promptText:

title: Realistic Soccer Match 4K Highlight
description: A comprehensive, multi-scene video generation prompt for a realistic soccer match in 4K using Seedance 2.0, focusing on physics and cinematic broadcast style.
promptText:
Shot Structure: 7 shots, 15 seconds, vertical screen 9:16. Realistic live-action filming — image-to-video.

Reference Image:

@Image1 = Main player/scorer — Keep his face, light brown slicked-back hair, fair skin, and light stubble consistent across every shot. Ignore the gray T-shirt in the photo; he wears the team uniform described below.

Characters:

Main player's uniform (his 10 teammates also wear the same): Black short-sleeved jersey, white lining/piping at the collar and cuffs, red shorts with black side inserts, red socks with black piping, dark shoes. All 11 opponents wear white and blue uniforms; their goalkeeper wears a green long-sleeved jersey and gloves.

Location: World Cup final at night. Full circular stands, cold white floodlight illumination. Deep green turf, wet grass with mist floating above and clear cleat marks below.

Music: Low, fast electronic drum beats and low-frequency stadium bass, like a heartbeat.

Style: Realistic live-action footage — looks like a real television broadcast of a match, not an animation. Real skin with pores, sweat, and faces reddened from exertion; real fabric that wrinkles, fits closely, and moves with action; real blades of grass, divots, splashes, and mud; real motion blur during fast pans, shallow depth of field in close-ups, natural floodlight colors. Real physics — momentum, weight, balance, real ball spin, and net deformation. No anime, no cartoon, no cel-shading, no illustration or digital painting; no flat color blocks, no plastic game CG, no smooth commercial rendering.

Shot 1 (0:00-0:02): Medium close-up, 28mm, near grass level, side view / He (see @Image1) dribbles into the white-and-blue defense. His right foot circles the ball twice in a step-over feint. He drops his outer shoulder; the first defender follows. He pushes with the outside of his right foot, then cuts back with the inside. The ball rolls past the defender's outstretched foot; he stays low and dribbles past from the other side. Cleats dig into the wet grass, splashing water. In the distance, both teams maintain full formations. 

Shot 2 (0:02-0:04): Foot close-up plus full body medium shot, 50mm, front view / A second defender slides low to tackle, one leg extended. He chips the ball up with his right toe. The ball clears the leg, rising to near knee height. He tucks his legs to clear the defender. Left foot lands first; right outer foot controls the falling ball and sends it forward. The defender slides out on the wet grass, kicking up mist. 

Shot 3 (0:04-0:06): Side medium close-up, 35mm, both visible / A third defender approaches from the front right. He stops the ball with his left foot and drags it behind him. His right shoulder turns toward the defender, pivoting on his support foot. His right sole takes the ball, then pushes it behind the defender. He ends facing the goal and continues running. 

Shot 4 (0:06-0:08): Full body wide angle, 32mm, back view / He catches up to the ball entering the penalty area, taps it across with the inside of his right foot to avoid a pursuer, then steps outside the ball with his left foot. Other defenders close in from both sides. Teammates cut in from the middle and far side. The green-clad goalkeeper comes out off his line. He looks at the goal, shortens his stride, and lets the ball roll off the outside of his right foot.

Shot 5 (0:08-0:10): Side medium-long shot, 65mm, player and goal both visible / He plants his left foot by the ball, chest and hips toward the far corner, right leg swinging back. The goalkeeper moves left, staying low, starting to dive. Before contact, he pulls his hips back, grazing the bottom right of the ball with the outside of his right foot. The ball is chipped up, spinning toward the goal.

Shot 6 (0:10-0:13): Goalkeeper's POV, 18mm, eye-level / The ball flies in from deep in the box, the black and white panels spinning larger and larger in frame. The goalkeeper dives left, hands reaching up from below. Near the six-yard box, the ball curves toward the top right, clearing the glove tips and face. He looks back as the ball continues toward the top right corner.

Shot 7 (0:13-0:15): Wide angle inside the goal, 24mm, turf and goal area visible / The ball hits the top right corner. The net bulges back; the knots shake and rebound, splashing water and grass debris. The goalkeeper lands on the opposite wet grass. Both teams still have 11 players each. White-and-blue players in the box and backfield turn toward the goal. Teammates run forward from various positions. After the shot, he stands upright, watching quietly. The entire stadium rises; cheers fill the air. Last frame: Net still taut, ball still spinning, players in the distance.

Note: All shots composed for vertical 9:16. Focal lengths, camera heights, and perspectives strictly maintained as written. Full 11v11 presence throughout; @Image1's face remains consistent in every shot.

title: Cinematic Rainy City Sword Action
description: An incredibly detailed multi-shot cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a magical swordsman fighting obsidian magical soldiers in a rainy intersection.
promptText:
The enemies are not living beings, but unmanned magical soldiers made of obsidian and metal. They have black polyhedral armor, horn-like protrusions, and blue glowing magic cores. The interiors consist only of stone, gears, and blue light.

The soldiers are irregularly scattered on roads, around vehicles, in side alleys, on walls, and on elevated tracks. Their size, orientation, distance, and posture vary slightly, and they are not arranged in equal intervals or symmetry. Each moves at different speeds and timings, running, leaping, zig-zagging, moving along walls, or stopping to aim.

Shot 1 (0–4s):
A rainy intersection. Lyra is in the foreground left, while magical soldiers are naturally scattered from the mid-ground to the background on the right. The camera moves close to Lyra across puddle reflections, passes her side, and shows the soldiers activating separately throughout the city. Blue magic cores light up in an irregular sequence.

Shot 2 (4–10s):
Lyra accelerates, splashing water. The camera moves low and parallel to her. As Lyra's sword passes through the soldiers' armor, blue cracks run along the obsidian shell following the slash line. In the next moment, the soldier shatters into geometric stone fragments and metal parts, and the internal blue magic vanishes into the sky as particles of light.

Lyra crushes a rushing leg-type, and shatters a zig-zagging type with a horizontal sweep. She rolls between two jumping from a car, stands up, and releases a pale blue slash. She destroys a descending individual from a wall with an aerial spin cut. Shattered obsidian pieces slide across the road, splashing rainwater.

Shot 3 (10–15s):
Numerous magical soldiers close in on Lyra. The front three raise their arms within sword range, mid-ground individuals approach from the sides, and a large distant individual is charging. Always keep Lyra and the approaching enemies in the same frame.

Lyra holds her sheathless sword low in her right hand. Pale blue light concentrates on the blade. Just before the front three attack, Lyra rotates her waist and releases a massive 180-degree horizontal fan-shaped shockwave. 

From a wide side angle, show Lyra, the sword, the enemies in front, and the shockwave simultaneously. The shockwave advances from front to back, carving a blue crack into the obsidian armor. With a split-second delay, they shatter chain-link style from near to far. Hundreds of obsidian fragments, metal pieces, and blue light particles cover the rainy intersection, reflecting the neon streetlights.

As the final large individual collapses into massive stone pieces, the blue magic core quietly goes out. Only Lyra stands at the intersection, lowering her sword and exhaling. Shattered obsidian pieces are hit by rain, and her white dress slowly settles.

Important:
Maintain consistency of enemies as unmanned stone and metal structures. When destroyed, draw only obsidian fragments, metal parts, and blue light particles. Do not depict soft body expressions or organic internal structures.

The final massive slash must be released at the moment multiple soldiers close in and enter their attack motion. Do not release the slash after enemies have disappeared or toward an empty road.

title: National Geographic Style Chameleon Macro Documentary
description: A highly detailed video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0 that mimics a National Geographic macro documentary. It features a chameleon in a Madagascar rainforest, showcasing its camouflage, eye movement, skin texture, and a 1000fps slow-motion capture of it hunting a grasshopper.
promptText:
[Style] National Geographic Macro Wildlife documentary, 4K UHD, macro photography (Laowa 24mm Macro Probe Lens), ultra-high-speed slow motion (Phantom TMX 1000fps), cinematic natural light, shallow depth of field.
[Duration] 10 seconds
[Scene] Madagascar rainforest canopy, on a thick branch covered in lichen and wet moss. The background features layered deep green leaves blurred into uniform bokeh, with a few beams of sunlight piercing the canopy to create contrast on the branch.
[00:00-00:04] Shot 1: Perfect Camouflage (Slow Lateral Tracking, Macro Close-Up)
A slow macro lateral track gradually reveals a veiled chameleon hidden in the moss. Its body is a dark green nearly identical to the moss, remaining motionless.
Skin Macro Detail: Each tubercular scale looks like a miniature gemstone facet, with subtle specular highlights at the tips and deeper dark green in the grooves between scales. The surface of the casque is rough and dry, like weathered rock in miniature.
Eye Close-up: Two turreted eyeballs rotate independently and slowly—left eye forward, right eye backward. The eyes are covered in scaled circular eyelids, leaving only a tiny central hole for the pupil. The iris has a precise golden-brown radial fiber texture, and the pupil is a tiny, pitch-black pinhole.
Forepaw Detail: The five toes are divided into groups of two and three to form pincers gripping the branch. The rough pads, texture of the toe bottoms, and tiny curved claws are clearly visible.
[00:04-00:07] Shot 2: Color Change Lock-On (Push-In to Head, Split Diopter Focus)
The camera slowly pushes into the side of the head. Both eyes suddenly turn toward the same direction—a bright green grasshopper 30cm ahead on a leaf vein.
Color Change Process (Core 4K Test Point): Starting from the tail, the scales light up like an LED matrix, changing from dark green to bright yellow-green in a wave. Each scale changes independently, first with the base color lightening, then yellow pigment spots appearing on the surface. As the color wave passes the mid-body, a transition zone is visible—single scales momentarily half-green and half-yellow.
Body Movement: The hind feet tighten their grip on the branch, claws carving tiny curved scratches in the bark, with a few bits of bark debris falling. The whole body leans forward 5 degrees extremely slowly to build tension, and the throat swells slightly.
[00:07-00:10] Shot 3: Slingshot Kill (Ultra High-Speed 1000fps, Side Profile Macro)
Side profile ultra-high-speed macro shot: The mouth opens to reveal a pinkish-white interior, and the muscles at the base of the tongue contract suddenly—
Slingshot Process (Slow Motion): The pink elastic tongue shoots out at 1.5 times the body length, extending like an unfolding spring in the air. The tip of the tongue is a bulbous mucus pad covered in papillary microstructures.
Hit Moment: The mucus pad precisely engulfs the grasshopper. Transparent silk-like mucus threads are seen stretching between the prey and the tongue surface, refracting subtle rainbow colors in the backlight.
Retraction: The tongue retracts at the same speed, pulling the grasshopper into the mouth. The chameleon closes its mouth, its jaws moving slowly as it chews. Final frame: One eyeball slowly turns toward the camera, pupil slightly dilating—freeze frame.

Every feather barb is razor-sharp — chocolate-brown back, snow-white underparts trembling in its own downdraft. In the pale-yellow iris the pupil snaps to a pinpoint as it fixes on a trout finning just beneath the surface. Tiny beads of mist cling to the leading edges of the wings.
[00:04-00:07] Shot 2: The Plunge (High-speed tracking, 240fps super slow motion)
Side-tracking high-speed shot: the osprey folds its wings and drops like a thrown spear, body stretched into a single straight line, talons swung forward and wide, dawn light sliding along the wet curve of the beak. Slow motion captures the instant of impact — the bird punches through the mirror surface and a crown of water bursts outward in a perfect ring, individual droplets hanging suspended in the air, each one catching the light like a glass bead. A translucent nictitating membrane sweeps across the eye a split second before contact.
[00:07-00:10] Shot 3: The Strike (Extreme close-up, macro lens)
Extreme macro close-up: the moment the talons close on the trout — scaled yellow toes spreading apart, black hooked claws sinking through flashing silver fish-scales, a thin sheet of water peeling off the feathers. Shallow depth of field blurs the spray streaking past the lens. Freeze-frame on a single droplet rolling off the tip of a claw, the fish's gill flaring open, cold light glinting on the soaked, curved talon.

promptText:

Scene: Late night in a luxurious imperial bedroom, a giant dragon bed with gold silk curtains, moonlight streaming through the window, candlelight flickering in contrast with the cool blue moonlight, faint white mist floating in the air.

Characters: The male lead is a tall, cold, and overbearing emperor with sharp facial contours, sword-like eyebrows, and deep eyes carrying strong pressure, wearing a black dragon robe with gold trim; the female lead is a white cat girl after transformation, with snow-white long hair and cute cat ears, brown eyes with light purple eyeshadow, exquisite makeup like a ball-jointed doll, wearing a white gauze dress, with a slender figure and a lazy yet stubborn temperament; the Empress Dowager is a majestic, harsh, and beautiful middle-aged woman in phoenix crown and robes, with a sharp gaze; the assassin is a lean, handsome middle-aged man with a cold aura and eyes sharp as a knife.

Style: Cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, high-end ancient style fashion photography texture, cinematic color grading, extreme details, fine hair on cat ears swaying slightly in the wind.

Storyboards:
0-3s: The emperor sits alone by the dragon bed, his cold profile deeply etched in the moonlight, hand gently stroking the snow-white cat beside him.
3-6s: The white cat curls up comfortably in his arms, the emperor rarely showing a soft gaze.

9-12s: Several eunuchs bow and withdraw, the screen quickly cuts to the black-clad assassin sneaking into the palace.
12-15s: The assassin's figure approaches the bedroom like a ghost, the emperor looks up alertly, and the white cat suddenly leaps up in warning.

Second Segment (15-30s):
15-18s: The assassin breaks through the window, long blade aimed at the white cat, the emperor instantly stands to shield the cat behind him.
18-21s: The white cat erupts in blinding white light under the moonlight, instantly transforming into a beautiful girl with cat ears, gauze dancing, brown eyes especially charming under light purple eyeshadow.
21-24s: The assassin's eyes turn from murderous intent to amazement and infatuation, the blade stopping mid-air.
24-27s: The cat-ear girl lands lightly, tail swaying slightly, looking up at the emperor with stubborn eyes.
27-30s: The emperor's gaze darkens, speaking in a low, overbearing voice: 'Dare to touch my cat, you seek death.'

Third Segment (30-45s):
30-33s: The cat-ear girl chuckles, cat ears twitching, taking the initiative to stand in front of the emperor, her exquisite makeup perfect like a porcelain doll in the moonlight.
33-36s: The assassin steps forward dazed, voice trembling: 'Young lady... what kind of fairy are you?'
36-39s: The emperor pulls the girl back into his arms, coldly scanning the assassin: 'She is mine, no one shall touch her.'
39-42s: The cat-ear girl looks up at the emperor, her gaze turning from stubbornness to attachment, whispering: 'Your Majesty... do you still want to hold me to sleep tonight?'
42-45s: The emperor's mouth curls slightly, leaning close to her ear, saying in an extremely low, overbearing tone: 'Not just tonight, you won't escape any night hereafter.' The camera lingers on their tension-filled gaze and the assassin's dazed expression.

title: 1980s Sitcom Nostalgia Scene

promptText:
A cozy suburban living room in 1987. Warm tungsten lamps, wood paneling, houseplants, VHS tapes, and a bulky CRT television create an authentic 1980s atmosphere. A handsome 18-year-old young man with feathered hair and a denim jacket sits on a plaid couch beside a pretty 18-year-old young woman with curly shoulder-length hair, pastel sweater, and jeans. They are relaxed, smiling and talking like lifelong friends. The scene has the look of a classic prime-time sitcom, with soft film grain, slight VHS color bleed, and gentle audience laughter after humorous moments.

The camera starts in a medium two-shot with subtle dolly movement. Both actors have natural eye contact, realistic facial expressions, blinking, and casual hand gestures. Warm practical lighting and slight halation around bright lamps evoke Kodak film stock.

Dialogue:

Young man (thoughtfully):
 "You know, maybe someday computers will get smart enough to help make movies."
Young woman (laughing softly):
 "Movies? Come on. You mean like robots writing scripts and making whole scenes?"

Young man:
 "Yeah, maybe. Imagine typing an idea and watching it come to life."
Young woman (smiling):
 "That sounds crazy. I wonder if AI will ever be able to make movies."

They exchange amused looks and laugh together. The audience chuckles lightly. The camera slowly pushes in as the CRT television flickers in the background.

Multi-camera sitcom lighting

title: Wuxia Action Duel Between Chinese and Japanese Swordsmen
description: A highly detailed cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a choreographed combat sequence between a Chinese swordsman and a Japanese martial artist in a sunset courtyard setting.
promptText:
[Style] Wuxia action film, photorealistic cinematic quality, IMAX quality, 8K Ultra HD, ramp-mo transitions, sharp editing style, 2 people on screen.

[Duration] 15 seconds

[Scene] An empty stone plaza outdoors at dusk with backlight. Scattered broken stone pillars, shallow puddles on the ground, orange-red sunset sky, a breeze swirling withered leaves.

[Characters] Chinese Swordsman @Image 1 (East Asian female with deep brown long hair and bangs, wearing an off-white knitted cardigan with deep blue stripes on the cuffs, beige camisole, brown plaid skirt, black stockings, dark loafers, holding a Chinese ring-pommel broadsword in her right hand); Japanese Swordsman @Image 2 (East Asian female with pink curly twin tails, wearing a pink cherry blossom pattern kimono, dark red wide obi with gold cord knots, holding a Japanese katana with both hands).

[00:00-00:03] Shot 1: Silent Standoff — Extreme Close-up

Cross Cut: Close-up of the Chinese swordsman's eyes—pupils suddenly contract, eyelashes tremble slightly; cut to close-up of the Japanese swordsman's eyes—sharp gaze, mouth slightly tightening.

Low Angle Close-up: Chinese swordsman grips the hilt tightly with her right hand, knuckles turning white; cut to Japanese swordsman slowly raising the katana to shoulder level, the kimono's wide sleeves draping down.

Panoramic: The two stand five paces apart, silhouetted against the light. A withered leaf falls between them—the moment the leaf touches the ground, both charge simultaneously, the puddles exploding into spray.

[00:03-00:07] Shot 2: First Round Exchange / Four Consecutive Strikes — Steadicam Tracking

Arc Shot 180°: Chinese swordsman rushes close, the ring-pommel sword swinging diagonally upward from the right low position, the blade cutting through the air with a sharp wind sound; Japanese swordsman parries vertically with her katana, the collision of the two blades producing a shower of practical sparks, the impact blowing both their hair back.

Quick Cut: Japanese swordsman uses the momentum of the parry to spin, her katana tracing an arc in a backhand horizontal sweep; Chinese swordsman leans back to dodge, the blade tip grazing the tip of her bangs as hair strands are tossed by the airflow.

Medium Shot: Chinese swordsman counters immediately before stabilizing, using the ring-pommel sword to block upward. The back of her blade clashes with the katana again, with sparks and water droplets splashing in front of the lens.

[00:07-00:11] Shot 3: Escalated Combat / Suppression and Counter — Slow-mo to Ramp

Super Slow-mo: Japanese swordsman leaps high, her kimono hem spreading like an umbrella in the air. She holds the katana with both hands overhead, slashing down with full force. The golden waist rope traces an arc in the air.

Speed Ramp (Slow to Normal): Chinese swordsman kneels on one knee, holding the ring-pommel sword horizontally overhead to catch the blow—the enormous force causes the stone floor to crack radially beneath her knee, and puddles are thrown into a circular water wall by the shockwave.

Close-up: Chinese swordsman looks up from the gap where the blades are locked, her expression turning from endurance to ferocity as she grit her teeth and forcibly repels the katana.

[00:11-00:15] Shot 4: Final Rush — Freeze Frame

Panoramic/High-Speed Photography: Both retreat three steps to gather strength. Chinese swordsman holds her sword in a reverse grip low at her waist; Japanese swordsman holds her katana at her right shoulder in an Iaido stance.

Symmetrical Shot: Both rush at each other with full strength, the cardigan hem and kimono sleeves flapping wildly. Their footsteps kick up two parallel waves in the puddles.

Freeze Frame: The moment they cross in the center of the frame, everything stops—the Chinese swordsman's blade has swept past the Japanese swordsman's side, and the katana has passed the Chinese swordsman. Shattered water droplets and sparks are suspended between them, colored gold by the backlight. The dusk light penetrates between their intersecting bodies, with clothes and hair frozen in the wind.

title: Jungle Supply Convoy Snake Ambush
description: A detailed action-oriented video prompt for a cinematic sequence showing a giant python attacking an army truck convoy in a muddy rainforest, complete with specific shot directions and sound cues.
promptText:
A muddy dirt track through thick green rainforest in grey daylight. An army supply convoy of trucks drives along the narrow track, jungle pressing in on both sides. A giant python, thick as a bus with dark green scales, has wrapped around the last truck and is dragging it backward into the trees. At the front, a gunner stands at a mounted gun on the lead gun-truck. Sound: roaring engines, groaning metal, soldiers shouting, snake hissing, rifle fire, radio voices.

Shot 1 (0–3s) — THE HOOK: Low rear shot in the mud. The giant python squeezes the last truck and hauls it backward off the track into the trees, wheels sliding in the mud. Soldiers on the truck fire their rifles into the thick coils, but the bullets do nothing. The rear driver wrestles his wheel and shouts into his radio: “IT’S PULLING ME INTO THE TREES!”

Shot 2 (3–6s): At the front of the convoy. The gunner swings his mounted gun around to point back down the line, but holds his fire — the snake is wrapped on the truck with men still on it. He calls on the radio: “Cut your trailer! Get it on the track!”

Shot 3 (6–9s): At the rear truck. The driver pulls the trailer release. The truck breaks free and lurches forward onto the track — and the python, still wrapped around the heavy trailer, is yanked out of the trees with it, spilling onto the open muddy track, rearing its head up in the clear.

Shot 4 (9–13s) — BIG SLOW-MOTION MOMENT: The snake is out in the open on the track now. The lead gunner opens fire. Bullet time — a long stream of heavy rounds flies down the line in slow motion, smoke and shell cases hanging in the air, tearing into the coiled python, mud and broken branches bursting up around it.

Shot 5 (13–15s): Time snaps back. The python drops and lies still across the muddy track beside the wrecked trailer, smoke rising off it. The freed rear truck pulls up the line to the others, soldiers climbing down into the mud. Smoke drifts through the trees. Cut.

title: Monochrome Text City Surreal Transformation
description: A surreal monochrome art-film prompt where city buildings are covered in handwritten text that detaches and transforms into weather phenomena like lightning and birds.
promptText:
A vast monochrome city under a blank white sky. Every building facade is covered with handwritten words in black ink poems, warnings, names, unfinished sentences. The streets are empty except for loose paper drifting across the pavement.

Opening frame: the camera glides down a silent boulevard between towering buildings covered in text. The ink moves slightly, as if breathing.

At the 2-second mark, one word detaches from a wall.

It floats into the air and becomes a cloud.

Then thousands of words peel away from buildings, rising into the sky. Some become rain, some become birds, some become lightning, some become black snow. Sentences unravel into long ribbon storms that whip through the streets.

The camera follows a single phrase as it transforms into a tornado of letters, pulling street signs, papers, and window reflections into its spiral.

VFX escalation: the weather becomes linguistic. Rain falls as tiny punctuation marks. Thunder appears as giant words flashing across the sky. Fog forms from erased sentences.

Velocity ramp: a lightning bolt made of handwritten text strikes the street , individual letters suspended in mid-impact, glowing white against the monochrome city.

Final moment: all text vanishes from the buildings, leaving the city completely blank. A single new word appears on the ground beneath the camera: REMEMBER.

promptText:
Style: 8K cinematic texture, live-action (non-gaming feel). First-person POV—camera is the guest perspective, slight handheld breathing effect, shallow depth of field, she is always close to the camera, making eye contact with 'you'. Warm indoor lighting, skin with pore-level realism, moist eyes with highlights, 24fps, 16:9. Audio: Ambient cafe white noise, her lines and giggles, clothing friction, no music or subtitles.

SUBJECT —— @ (100% consistent with input image): Tsundere yet gentle cute maid, pink lenses in round frames, brown braids, black and white maid dress + white apron, white over-the-knee socks, black Mary Jane platform heels. First-person 'emotional companionship'—giving all attention to the person behind the camera, healing, pampered, and focused atmosphere. LOCATION —— Cozy maid cafe corner booth, warm yellow lights, blurred bar and flowers, STYLE REFERENCE ONLY, world is freely extendable.

ACTION —— She faces the camera (you) the entire time, eyes always looking into the lens as if you are the only important person.

SHOT 1 (0:00–0:04) —— She sits across from you/leans in slightly, hands on chin, eyes smiling, softly: 'You're back~ I've been waiting for you, Master.'

SHOT 2 (0:04–0:08) —— Expression turns to concern, leans forward closer to the lens, tilts head to look at you: 'Are you... exhausted again today? It's okay, you don't have to think about anything here.'

SHOT 4 (0:12–0:15) —— Tsundere-ly turns away then can't help turning back, blushing, soft whining: 'Just... only for today, staying with you a bit longer is fine.' Freeze on her smiling eyes.

CAMERA —— First-person fixed at guest's sitting height, sitting across from her, slight handheld breathing shake; eye-level at her face throughout, no third-person cuts, 'you' don't appear. Shot 3 as she reaches out, camera tilts back slightly as if touched.

STYLE —— Warm yellow lights + warm wood booth 60% / Black and white maid dress 30% / Pink lenses + blushing cheeks + eye light 10%. White balance 4800K warm tone, soft focus.

CONSTRAINTS —— 16:9, normal speed, no slow motion. Strict first-person POV, camera is your eyes, do not show yourself, no bystander perspective. Consistent interaction with the lens. title: Pixar-Style Noodle City Animation
description: A massive multi-scene cinematic prompt that creates a Pixar-quality animation of a fantasy noodle city, featuring a flavor crisis event and a heroic chicken superhero transformation.
promptText:
Style: Pixar-quality CGI animation, DreamWorks-level character acting, ultra-detailed food textures, cinematic advertising, volumetric lighting, golden-hour atmosphere, premium commercial quality, dynamic camera movement, expressive animation, rich color grading, 16:9.

⸻

SCENE 1 (0-2s) — NOODLE CITY

A breathtaking aerial fly-through of a magnificent fantasy city built entirely from noodles, vegetables, herbs, spices, steaming soup canals, and giant noodle-bowl skyscrapers. Warm golden sunlight bathes the city. Happy food citizens walk through bustling streets. Steam rises gracefully from food markets. Cinematic drone camera movement, vibrant colors, whimsical Pixar-style worldbuilding.

⸻

SCENE 2 (2-4s) — FLAVOR CRISIS

Suddenly the steam disappears from food stalls. Colors drain from the city. Citizens stop and look around in confusion. Giant digital Flavor Meter in the city square rapidly drops from 100% to 0%. Red emergency lights flash across buildings. Dramatic tension builds. Fast push-in camera movement. Dark clouds begin gathering overhead.

⸻

SCENE 3 (4-6s) — HERO SIGNAL

The sky darkens. A giant glowing golden chicken symbol bursts through the clouds like a superhero beacon. Citizens stare upward in awe. Powerful rays of golden light illuminate the city below. Wind sweeps through the streets. Cinematic upward camera tilt.

⸻

SCENE 4 (6-8s) — EPIC ARRIVAL

The clouds explode apart. A muscular anthropomorphic chicken superhero crash-lands in the city center. Noodles, vegetables, dust, and flavor particles blast outward dramatically. The ground shakes. Slow-motion hero landing pose. Dynamic cinematic action. Debris flying through the air.

⸻

SCENE 5 (8-10s) — THE SOLUTION

Low-angle hero reveal. Golden feathers glowing in sunlight. Bright red comb. Blue eyes. Green hero vest fluttering in the wind. The hero smiles confidently and raises a glowing green noodle packet above his head. Golden energy radiates from the package. Camera circles around hero dramatically.

⸻

SCENE 6 (10-12s) — FLAVOR EXPLOSION

The noodle packet tears open. A massive golden flavor energy blast erupts into the sky. Thousands of glowing particles swirl through the city streets. The energy forms a gigantic golden chicken-shaped spirit soaring across the skyline. Epic magical transformation sequence. Dynamic aerial tracking shot.

⸻

SCENE 7 (12-14s) — CITY RESTORED

The city instantly regains color and life. Steam rises from food stalls. Buildings glow with vibrant noodle textures. Herbs and spices swirl through the air. Citizens cheer and celebrate. Confetti-like flavor particles float everywhere. Wide cinematic reveal of the restored city.

⸻

SCENE 8 (14-15s) — PRODUCT SHOT

Premium advertising hero shot. A steaming bowl of delicious noodles sits in the foreground beside a glowing green noodle packet. The chicken superhero stands proudly behind them, pointing confidently

title: Anime Dance with Hand-Drawn Crayon Effects
description: A detailed video generation prompt for creating high-quality Japanese anime dance clips featuring hand-drawn crayon/pastel effects and character consistency from a reference image.
promptText:
Use the character from the reference image as the protagonist. 15 seconds, 24fps. Japanese full-color anime. High-quality animation style like a theatrical feature film. High frame count. A short dance video designed to go viral with strong cuteness. The protagonist is the character from the reference image themselves. Maintain the hairstyle, hair color, eyes, facial features, build, age, clothing impression, accessories, and overall atmosphere of the reference image. The background is a bright and cute, organized classroom-like or studio-like space. Keep the background simple so the person is the star, but with a pop and fresh atmosphere.

Music: Japanese song. No existing real songs should be used.

Visual Concept: The protagonist performs a cute dance. Priority on cuteness. Slightly flirtatious, friendly, and strongly projecting the feeling of dancing for the camera. 2D flat animations, as if made in After Effects, appear in sync with the dance movements. Effects are hand-drawn cute illustrations with a texture like crayon or oil pastel. Circles, stars, hearts, flowers, notes, arrows, ribbons, crowns, sparkles, wavy lines, swirly lines, speech bubble frames, checker patterns, diagonal lines, halftone dots, etc. All are flat 2D animations. Color palette centered on pink, light blue, yellow, white, lavender, and mint green, harmonizing with the character's colors.

Camera Composition: A 5-camera setup. Cameras are not fixed; they switch every 2 seconds. Cameras used: Front, Top (High Angle), Left, Right, and Back. Regardless of the camera angle, the protagonist always remains aware of the lens and maintains eye contact. Even in non-front angles, they look at the lens by turning their head or shifting their gaze. In the back-angle camera, they look over their shoulder at the lens. Viral-ready camerawork with varied angles and good tempo. Cameras are not static; they shake lightly to the beat with small vertical bounces, short punch-ins, and slight side-to-side sways. Intentional and clean camera shake, not messy.

Dance Content: Cute and easy-to-mimic dance. Light side steps, hand heart in front of chest, one-hand heart, cheek peace sign, opening hands by cheeks, pointing, small shoulder bounces, light hip sways, leg out and back, small turns, and ending with a wink. Focus on upper body moves for high impact in a short duration. Always maintain eye contact as if dancing directly for the viewer.

15-Second Timeline:
0.0-2.0s: Front camera. Protagonist in the center, keeping rhythm, making a hand heart in front of the chest with small side steps. Light vertical camera bounce. Crayon hearts, stars, and circles appear around the hands and face. Front-facing eye contact.
2.0-4.0s: Top camera. Slightly high-angle cute shot. Looking up at the lens with cheek peace sign, one-hand heart, and pointing. Crowns, flowers, and bubble frames appear around the face.
4.0-6.0s: Left camera. Body turned slightly left but face and gaze toward the lens. Hip sways, one hand on cheek, other hand waving. Crayon ribbon lines, notes, and stars follow hand movements. Light side camera sway.
6.0-8.0s: Right camera. Body turned right, maintaining eye contact. Rhythmic shoulder bounces, arm movements, and leg steps. Flowers, circles, and halftone dots burst at the feet and shoulders. Short beat-matched punch-in.
8.0-10.0s: Back camera. Starts from the back, but they spin to look over the shoulder at the lens. Small turn with pointing and a finger-heart or blow-kiss gesture. Swirly lines and stars appear around the hair and clothes.
10.0-12.0s: Back to front camera. High energy section. Opening arms wide, small bounces. Larger hearts, stars, and flowers increase to maximize cuteness. Short camera shakes with each move.
12.0-14.0s: Back to top camera. Looking up, opening hands by face, one-hand heart. Frames, hearts, and flowers spread in the background. Continuous eye contact.
14.0-15.0s: Front hero shot. Bust-up close shot. Smiling and ending with a wink. Crayon four-pointed stars, hearts, and ribbons burst from the eye. Short punch-in and stop on the final viral cut.

AE-style 2D Animation Direction: All effects are flat 2D animations as if made in After Effects but with a rough, hand-drawn crayon/pastel texture. Movements include appearing, bouncing, scaling, rotating, and fading. Effects are synchronized with hands, face, feet, and body movements without obscuring the face. 

Constraints: No other people except the protagonist. Maintain character consistency from the reference image (face, hair, eyes, age, clothing). Do not change characters or outfits. Use the 5-camera composition switching every 2 seconds. Constant eye contact at all times. Crayon hand-drawn style effects only. No realistic fire, smoke, or excessive glitch. No text, subtitles, or logos.

title: Cinematic Water Transformation Scene
description: A highly detailed prompt for an elemental water transformation on a storm-battered coast, specifically attributed to Leonardo AI in the metadata.
promptText:
15-second ultra-cinematic elemental transformation sequence on a storm-battered coastline at twilight.

A lone figure stands on black volcanic rocks facing a violent ocean. Massive waves crash against the cliffs while dark storm clouds gather across the horizon. Rain and sea spray fill the air.

The atmosphere is primal, immense, and realistic.

The camera slowly circles around the figure as the ocean begins behaving unnaturally. Nearby waves stop for a brief moment as if listening.

Water starts flowing upward around the figure's feet instead of falling back into the sea.

The transformation begins.

Thin streams of seawater wrap around the body like living ribbons. The skin becomes translucent in places, revealing swirling currents, bubbles, and glowing blue ocean energy beneath the surface.

The camera pushes closer as the body gradually dissolves into moving water. Arms become liquid currents. Hair transforms into flowing streams of sea foam. The lower body merges with spiraling ocean waves.

The transformation accelerates.

Entire sections of the surrounding ocean rise into the air and orbit around the figure. Schools of fish, fragments of coral, shells, and bioluminescent particles become suspended inside the water.

Thunder crashes overhead.

The figure expands dramatically in scale. Their silhouette becomes a gigantic humanoid tsunami composed of roaring waves, rotating currents, foam, spray, and deep ocean energy.

Massive walls of water rise behind them, towering higher than cliffs. The sea itself appears connected to the transformation.

At the climax, the Living Tsunami stands at colossal scale above the coastline, a giant formed entirely from moving ocean water and storm energy. Lightning illuminates the immense translucent body while entire waves flow through its arms and chest.

Final cinematic moment: the Living Tsunami raises one arm toward the horizon. An enormous tidal wave rises from the ocean and follows the gesture. The camera pulls back to reveal the colossal water titan standing between sea and sky as the storm revolves around it.

Style: ultra cinematic realism, elemental water transformation, photoreal ocean simulation, tsunami-scale water effects, storm atmosphere, realistic fluid dynamics, massive environmental scale, bioluminescent ocean details, AAA visual effects quality, no text, no overlays.

Audio: epic cinematic orchestral score, crashing waves, deep ocean resonance, hurricane winds, thunder, water surges, distant whale calls, atmospheric storm energy, colossal elemental power.

Made in @LeonardoAi

title: Cinematic Somersault Performance Video Prompt
description: A comprehensive video generation prompt for creating a realistic 8K cinematic shot of a young woman performing a somersault with precise physics and audio details.
promptText:
Style: 8K cinematic texture. Real photography—not 3D rendering, not game engines, not game cutscenes. 
Photography: Naturalist master-level photography. 
Lighting: Artificial studio light sources only—softbox as key light from the left side of the frame, Fresnel lamp as rim light, a spotlight on the background wall, a warm lamp in the corner for environmental accent, and thin airborne dust/mist. 
Color: 60:30:10—Main color / Secondary color / Accent color. 
Lens: Physical cinematic lens. 180° shutter motion blur. 
Skin: Pore-level realism—vellus hair, asymmetrical small moles, capillary redness, pore shadows matching the site lighting. 
Performance: Top-tier cinematic—micro-pauses before reactions, precise eye contact, moist and lifelike eyes with catchlights, visible breathing and chest rise/fall. 
Physics: Respect gravity and inertia—mass has real weight, correct contact shadows, skirt and hair strands swing realistically with movement. No floating props. 
Composition: Rule of thirds + Golden ratio. The subject is vivid and active from the first frame. 
Continuity: Person, clothing, hairstyle, stockings, and leather shoes are 100% consistent across all shots. No identity drift. 
Tech: 24fps smooth motion. 8K detail. No jitter. 
Audio: Clean vocals + action SFX (stepping, landing, fabric sounds) + room ambient noise. No background music. No subtitles. 

SUBJECT —— @ wenyou (100% consistent with input image): An academic-style girl-next-door type young woman, long brown wavy hair with air bangs, cream-white academic knit cardigan (navy stripes on cuffs) + beige vest, plaid pleated miniskirt, thin black stockings, brown loafers. An audition self-tape including a gymnastics talent segment. Goal: Full body in frame, cheering with fresh energy and a clean cartwheel/front flip, making the audience feel her vitality and like her within 10 seconds. Emotional beats: Bright greeting → flip explosion → landing with a finger heart. White balance 5600K. MULTISHOT. 

LOCATION —— @ Image 

ACTION —— She brightly introduces herself, then runs and performs a clean cartwheel (transitioning to a front flip) as a talent, landing steadily and cheering with a finger heart. Full body always in frame, showing the run-up, mid-air, and landing cushion. Mouth movements and breathing strictly lip-sync to the following dialogue. 
Dialogue + Talent (Chinese, approx. 10s): 
"Hi, I'm Wen You! (smiling eyes) Words aren't enough—watch this!" (light run-up, mid-air flip) (steady landing, double finger heart) "If you like it, please vote for me, let's go!" 
Shot 1 (0:00–0:03) —— Medium wide shot: @ wenyou stands still, tilts her head with a bright smile, brushes her hair, greets warmly and introduces herself. Hard cut. 
Shot 2 (0:03–0:08) —— Full body wide shot: She takes a few light run-up steps, executes a clean cartwheel into a front flip, skirt and curls swing realistically with the rotation, body stretched, axis stable, lands firmly with a slight knee cushion and a realistic weight sound. Hard cut. 
Shot 3 (0:08–0:10) —— Medium close-up: After landing, she straightens up with a post-exercise flush and a radiant smile, makes a large heart with her hands in front of her chest, looks at the camera and says "If you like it, please vote for me, let's go!". Freeze on smiling eyes. Hard cut. 

CAMERA —— Shot 1: Medium shot from the chest up, eye level, 50mm, locked position with slight handheld breathing; Motive = bright first impression. Shot 2: Zoom out to full body shot, slightly low eye level, 28mm wide angle, smooth horizontal tracking pan following the flip, fully capturing the airborne arc; Motive = displaying gymnastic tension. Shot 3: Push back to medium close-up, eye level, 65mm, slow zoom-in on the heart gesture; Motive = magnifying energetic infection. 

STYLE —— Main color: dark studio set + light gray background wall 60% / Secondary color: cream-white cardigan + warm skin tone 30% / Accent color: plaid skirt + navy stripes + background spotlight 10%. White balance 5600K. Softbox key light from left, Fresnel rim light, thin mist. 

CONSTRAINTS —— 16:9. Keep normal speed for the flip, no slow motion or wire floating, mid-air and landing constrained by real gravity and inertia, landing has cushion weight. Full body in frame, run-up, mid-air, and landing all visible. Stable camera without motion sickness. Natural and precise lip-sync. No markings, stickers, or tracking points on the ground or in the frame. Maintain 100% identity, clothing, hair, stockings, shoes, and studio set consistency across all shots. No glowing eyes.

title: Don Bluth Style Egyptian Anubis Animation
description: A multi-scene animation prompt in the classic Don Bluth style, featuring Anubis, Pharaoh, and a thief in an Egyptian palace setting.
promptText: Classic Don Bluth animation style. Scene 1: Inside an Egyptian palace, we see two human thieves escaping with a golden crown, a human pharaoh watching them from a few meters away, pointing at them angrily and shouting: 'Anubis, after them!' However, we only hear Anubis's giggling, which surprises the pharaoh. The pharaoh turns his head and sees the following: camera steady, the mighty jackal god Anubis kneeling on the ground, arms raised high, hands behind his head, eyes closed and giggling. A human thief squats on the ground, gently and smoothly stroking Anubis's armpit with a feather. Scene 2: The thief continues to tickle Anubis's armpit with the feather, Anubis giggles, and while the thief says 'giggle giggle', Anubis twists his upper body, but his hands remain behind his head, armpits exposed to the feather tickling. Scene 3: The thief continues to tickle Anubis's armpit with the feather, Anubis giggles and squirm. Scene 4: The thief stops tickling Anubis's armpit, Anubis lets out a few more giggles. The human thief also escapes, and Anubis slowly sits up, arms wrapped around himself, with a mischievous grin still on his face from being tickled, looking slightly tired. Scene 5: The camera cuts to the pharaoh, Anubis appears beside him in a majestic posture with his hands behind his back, looking both nonchalant and serious, saying to the pharaoh: 'It seems they got away, master.' The pharaoh bows his head in disappointment and says: 'I see.' Anubis is a black anthropomorphic muscular jackal wearing rings on his arms and neck. Dialogue in English.

title: Cinematic Underwater Monster Encounter Video
description: A highly detailed, multi-part cinematic prompt for creating a single-shot underwater exploration video involving a free-diver and a giant cave eel encounter.
promptText:
Create a 15-second cinematic single-shot extreme underwater adventure video. An adult female free-diver wearing long fins and a transparent mask is slowly descending above a dreamlike tropical coral reef. Realistic underwater camera texture, clear turquoise water, with large moving shafts of light cast from the surface. Colorful corals, sea fans, soft corals, small schools of fish, and floating particles unfold in layers. The shot starts extremely close to her mask and upper body from the front, showing her calm breath-holding, her collarbones and neck lines, and the curves of her waist and abdomen outlined by her tight-fitting wetsuit. The camera then smoothly orbits behind her, following in a low-angle shot close to her shoulders, back, waistline, hips, legs, and fins, always keeping her body and the coral reef as a large proportion of the frame, never turning into a distant scenery shot. She glides along a coral canyon, maintaining a streamlined body and a stable core, using only small fin kicks for propulsion, her fingers lightly avoiding corals, with realistic water currents causing hair, bubbles, and fine sand to move slightly. A huge, dark underwater cave entrance appears ahead, surrounded by bioluminescent fish and purplish-blue corals—dreamy but dangerous. She turns on a small wrist light, and the camera advances close to her face and shoulder as the light sweeps into the cave. Fish suddenly scatter, and the massive head of a giant eel slowly emerges from the shadows. The eel's head is nearly as large as the protagonist's entire torso, with a broad skull, heavy jaw, and a thick coiled body filling the cave's interior. The eel is not ordinary-sized but massive, like a cave monster. The protagonist stops at the entrance, her body sinking slightly, back tensed, hand slowly moving toward a small diving knife on her leg, her gaze calm but alert. The frame freezes at the moment of confrontation with the giant eel. No text, no logos, no subtitles, no watermarks. Realistic underwater photography, dreamy coral reef blockbuster quality.

Create a 15-second cinematic single-shot underwater monster melee combat video, continuing the plot immediately after the cave confrontation. Setting: Inside the dark underwater cave, with the blue-green light of the distant coral reef visible outside the entrance. The interior features rock walls, fine sand, gravel, water particles, bubbles, and churned-up dust. The space is narrow, water currents are chaotic, and the giant eel's body is coiled within, creating intense pressure. Video Style: A continuous 15-second single shot with no cuts, hidden cuts, transitions, or montages. Realistic underwater action photography with the camera moving close to the protagonist's body, water currents, and rock walls, featuring underwater resistance, bubble occlusion, swirling dust, and natural motion blur. Violence is presented with monster-thriller intensity but without dismemberment, exposed flesh, or excessive blood. Opening Shot: The video begins as she has already entered the cave's edge. The shot starts very close behind her shoulder, showing one hand gripping the rock wall and the other holding a small diving knife, her body hovering, with her silver top and light blue professional diving shorts clinging to her body in the dim light, and long fins making small movements for balance. Ahead in the darkness, the giant eel's head is turning toward her. Camera Movement: The camera stays close to her side-back and below, maintaining a low underwater angle, not allowing a pull-back into a chaotic wide shot. The shot must continuously keep her body, the knife, the rock wall support, and the eel's head clearly visible simultaneously. The eel's head must always appear close to the size of her torso, showing a clear physical difference. Action Flow: She attempts to retreat along the cave edge, but the giant eel suddenly lunges from the side shadows, its massive head filling the screen, biting down on the clothing area near her waist and lower body, dragging her violently deeper into the cave through her athletic gear. Her body is pulled into an arc, her back instantly tensing, core contracting, and legs kicking off the rock wall, with fins kicking up dust and bubbles. The bite must be portrayed as a giant creature's predatory suppression of clothing and body position, without showing flesh or dismemberment. The eel continues to drag her, its thick body coiling past her side, its tail sweeping the wall, causing gravel and dust to explode in the water. She doesn't swing the knife blindly but first uses one forearm to brace against the eel's massive head, while her other hand grips the knife, simultaneously pushing off the rock wall to rotate her hips and shoulders out of the drag direction. The camera captures her calm eyes behind the mask at extremely close range, her clenched expression, bubbles rising from the mask edge, and the realistic twisting of her body against underwater resistance. At the most dangerous moment, the frame enters brief dramatic slow motion. The giant eel snaps again to drag harder, and she uses the momentum to spin, pressing her forearm against its head and precisely stabbing the knife into its eye. A cloud of brownish-yellow murky liquid bursts from the eye, dispersing quickly like smoke in the turquoise water. This is monster-style yellow body fluid, not red blood. The eel thrashes in pain, its massive mouth opening, finally releasing her. Final Moments: Slow motion ends; the eel violently whips its body, kicking up sand, rocks, and bubbles, then turns to swim deeper into the cave, its thick body disappearing into the dark. She doesn't pursue but immediately sheathes the knife, pressing one hand against the bitten (but not bloody) clothing area while the other pushes off the rock wall, straightening her body into a streamlined shape and powerfully kicking out of the cave with her long fins. The camera follows closely behind her upward, as she passes through the coral light outside the entrance and ascends along a sunbeam. Finally, she breaks the surface, gasping for air, water sliding off her mask, high ponytail, and silver top, with the distant coral sea sparkling. She looks back down at the water tiredly, confirming the giant eel isn't following. No text, no logos, no subtitles, no watermarks, no explicit gore.

title: Tom and Jerry Live Action Interaction
description: A technical prompt for integrating 3D animated characters (Tom and Jerry) into a real-world golden hour park scene with complex physical interactions.
promptText:
A young woman with long dark hair and side-swept bangs stands on a tree-lined park pathway during warm golden-hour sunlight. Lush green trees and grass fill the background, while a few distant pedestrians walk along the path.

She wears a gray cardigan over a white V-neck top and initially looks calmly into the camera with a relaxed, natural expression.

Jerry (3D CGI mouse) stands on her left shoulder, while Tom (3D CGI cat) stands on her right shoulder.

Jerry notices Tom across her shoulders and becomes visibly nervous. Tom slowly points toward Jerry. Suddenly, Jerry dashes across her shoulders and through her hair, and Tom immediately begins chasing him.

The woman notices the movement and starts laughing naturally.

Jerry jumps from shoulder to shoulder while Tom follows closely behind. Their playful chase loops around her head, shoulders, and neck, weaving through her hair and around her cardigan. She tracks them with her eyes, reacting with genuine amusement and delight.

Tom makes one final dramatic leap toward Jerry but completely misses.

Jerry lands safely on her shoulder and celebrates victoriously. Tom appears frustrated and defeated.

The woman smiles warmly and looks directly into the camera as the scene concludes.

Visual Style

- Photorealistic outdoor environment
- Warm golden-hour lighting
- Smooth cinematic camera movement
- Natural facial expressions
- Premium commercial-quality production
- Highly detailed rendering
- Family-friendly tone
- Viral social-media aesthetic
- Consistent character scale throughout
- Realistic interaction with hair, clothing, and environment
- Smooth 3D animation matching modern movie-style Tom and Jerry characters
- Believable physics and character integration
